drafts.subject: Smith Point Capital — Salient
drafts.body:
Hi Arijit,

I've been keeping a close eye on Salient. What keeps standing out: you're building AI voice and text agents that automate loan servicing for lenders — collections, onboarding, payments, and compliance in real time — exactly the kind of deeply embedded, mission-critical software we love to back.

Quick reminder on us: Smith Point is an enterprise-software fund founded by Keith Block (former co-CEO of Salesforce), with Burke Norton (Salesforce, Vista) and Chris Lytle. We back mission-critical software and get hands-on with GTM, enterprise pricing, and C-suite introductions.

On the "more than capital" front, we believe the fastest path to scale here runs through the major financial institutions — custodians, wirehouses, banks, and insurers — where Keith Block and the team hold active C-suite relationships. We can help accelerate those enterprise sales motions and work with founders on GTM strategy, enterprise pricing, and leadership buildout.

Would love to grab ~20 minutes to compare notes — no agenda, just have a hunch there could be a fit. Lmk if useful.

Best,
Lilly

Quick reminder on us: Smith Point is an enterprise-software fund founded by Keith Block (former co-CEO of Salesforce), with Burke Norton (Salesforce, Vista) and Chris Lytle. We back mission-critical software and get hands-on with GTM, enterprise pricing, and C-suite introductions.

On the "more than capital" front, we have C-suite-level connections to enterprises like Anthropic, OpenAI, and Databricks, and can help accelerate enterprise sales motions in ways that are hard to replicate. We also work closely with founders on GTM strategy, enterprise pricing, and building out leadership teams at key inflection points.

Would love to grab ~20 minutes to compare notes — no agenda, just have a hunch there could be a fit. Lmk if useful.

Best,
Lilly

drafts.subject: Smith Point Capital — Aria
drafts.body:
Hi Clément,

I'm Lilly, an investor at Smith Point Capital — an enterprise software fund co-founded by Keith Block, former co-CEO of Salesforce, alongside Burke Norton (formerly Salesforce, Vista) and Chris Lytle (formerly Morgan Stanley).

Congrats on the recent Series A ($274M). We like getting to know founders early and building relationships well before a round comes together — no agenda, and totally understand if you're heads-down right now. We partner with founders who want more than capital — an operator-led approach backed by a team with deep experience scaling mission-critical platforms across Salesforce, ServiceNow, Cisco, Databricks, and Oracle.

On the "more than capital" front: we believe the fastest path to scale here runs through the major financial institutions — custodians, wirehouses, banks, and insurers — where Keith Block and the team hold active C-suite relationships. We can help accelerate those enterprise sales motions and work with founders on GTM strategy, enterprise pricing, and leadership buildout.

We've been spending time in this space, and Aria stands out:
- You're building fintech & payments — exactly the kind of deeply embedded, mission-critical software we like to back.
- Momentum is real — your recent Series A ($274M) signals genuine enterprise pull.

Would you be open to a brief intro call? Would love to hear more about Aria and share more about Smith Point. Please lmk what works in the coming weeks!

Best,
Lilly
drafts.based_on: Congrats on the recent Series A ($274M).
